t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Global Customer ID of the wallet owner. Resolved by joining the final output to Wallet.Wallets via WalletId. Gcid=0 indicates omnibus/system wallets. From Wallet.Wallets.Gcid.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Global Customer ID of the wallet owner. Resolved by joining the final output to Wallet.Wallets via WalletId. Gcid=0 indicates omnibus/system wallets. From Wallet.Wallets.Gcid.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Customer ID - platform-internal primary key. Assigned at registration. Unique within etoro DB. Used as the universal customer identifier across all tables.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Customer ID - platform-internal primary key. Assigned at registration. Unique within etoro DB. Used as the universal customer identifier across all tables. Passthrough from Dim_Customer via GCID lookup.
t1_fidelity_table.loss: Added DWH routing context ('Passthrough from Dim_Customer via GCID lookup'); no upstream text lost

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: The cryptocurrency of this transaction. FK to Wallet.CryptoTypes.CryptoID. From SentTransactions.CryptoId or ReceivedTransactions.CryptoId.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: The cryptocurrency of this transaction. FK to Wallet.CryptoTypes.CryptoID. From SentTransactions.CryptoId or ReceivedTransactions.CryptoId.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: The wallet involved in this transaction. From SentTransactions.WalletId or ReceivedTransactions.WalletId.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: The wallet involved in this transaction. From SentTransactions.WalletId or ReceivedTransactions.WalletId.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Transaction identifier. SentTransactions.Id for sends, ReceivedTransactions.Id for receives. Not globally unique across action types - combine with ActionTypeId to distinguish.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Transaction identifier. SentTransactions.Id for sends, ReceivedTransactions.Id for receives. Not globally unique across action types - combine with ActionTypeId to distinguish.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Latest status ID. Resolved via correlated subquery: `SELECT TOP 1 StatusId FROM *Statuses ORDER BY Id DESC`. FK to Dictionary.TransactionStatus.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Latest status ID. Resolved via correlated subquery: `SELECT TOP 1 StatusId FROM *Statuses ORDER BY Id DESC`. FK to Dictionary.TransactionStatus.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Human-readable status name from Dictionary.TransactionStatus. Values: Pending, Verified, Error, Done, Cancelled, NeedsApproval.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Human-readable status name from Dictionary.TransactionStatus. Values: Pending, Verified, Error, Done, Cancelled, NeedsApproval.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Transaction date. For sends: SentTransactions.Occurred. For receives: ReceivedTransactions.BlockchainTransactionDate.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Transaction date. For sends: SentTransactions.Occurred. For receives: ReceivedTransactions.BlockchainTransactionDate.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Transaction amount in native crypto units. From SentTransactionOutputs.Amount (sends) or ReceivedTransactions.Amount (receives). ISNULL defaults to 0 for "other" types.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Transaction amount in native crypto units. From SentTransactionOutputs.Amount (sends) or ReceivedTransactions.Amount (receives). ISNULL defaults to 0 for "other" types.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: External provider fees. Only populated for Payment transactions (type 7) from PaymentTransactions.ProviderFeeCalculated. NULL for all other types.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: External provider fees. Only populated for Payment transactions (type 7) from PaymentTransactions.ProviderFeeCalculated. NULL for all other types.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Exchange rate for fee currency conversion. ConversionOut: source/dest USD rate ratio. Payment: 1/ExchangeRate. Others: 1. NULL for receives.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Exchange rate for fee currency conversion. ConversionOut: source/dest USD rate ratio. Payment: 1/ExchangeRate. Others: 1. NULL for receives.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Actual blockchain network fee (gas/miner fee). For redemptions: counted once per transaction (ROW_NUMBER=1). From SentTransactions.BlockchainFee. NULL for receives.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Actual blockchain network fee (gas/miner fee). For redemptions: counted once per transaction (ROW_NUMBER=1). From SentTransactions.BlockchainFee. NULL for receives.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Estimated/effective blockchain fee for fee calculations. Redemptions: EstimatedBlockchainFee + InitialFeeAmount. Conversions/Payments: EstimatedBlockChainFee. Staking: BlockchainEstFee. NULL for receives.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Estimated/effective blockchain fee for fee calculations. Redemptions: EstimatedBlockchainFee + InitialFeeAmount. Conversions/Payments: EstimatedBlockChainFee. Staking: BlockchainEstFee. NULL for receives.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Transaction direction: 1=Sent (outgoing), 2=Recive (incoming). Hard-coded per CTE block.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Transaction direction: 1=Sent (outgoing), 2=Recive (incoming). Hard-coded per CTE block.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Human-readable direction: 'Sent' or 'Recive' (legacy misspelling preserved for backward compatibility).
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Human-readable direction: 'Sent' or 'Recive' (legacy misspelling preserved for backward compatibility).

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Sender's blockchain address. Sends: from WalletPool.PublicAddress (wallet's own address). Receives: from ReceivedTransactions.SenderAddress (external sender).
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Sender's blockchain address. Sends: from WalletPool.PublicAddress (wallet's own address). Receives: from ReceivedTransactions.SenderAddress (external sender).

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Receiver's blockchain address (legacy misspelling "Reciver"). Sends: from SentTransactionOutputs.ToAddress. Receives: from ReceivedTransactions.ReceiverAddress.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Receiver's blockchain address (legacy misspelling "Reciver"). Sends: from SentTransactionOutputs.ToAddress. Receives: from ReceivedTransactions.ReceiverAddress.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: On-chain transaction hash. Unique identifier on the blockchain for tracking and verification. From SentTransactions or ReceivedTransactions.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: On-chain transaction hash. Unique identifier on the blockchain for tracking and verification. From SentTransactions or ReceivedTransactions.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Sent transaction type: 0=Redeem, 5=ConversionMoneyIn, 6=ConversionMoneyOut, 7=Payment, 8=RedeemAsic, 9=Staking. NULL for received transactions. FK to Dictionary.TransactionTypes.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Sent transaction type: 0=Redeem, 5=ConversionMoneyIn, 6=ConversionMoneyOut, 7=Payment, 8=RedeemAsic, 9=Staking. NULL for received transactions. FK to Dictionary.TransactionTypes.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Human-readable type name from Dictionary.TransactionTypes. NULL for received transactions.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Human-readable type name from Dictionary.TransactionTypes. NULL for received transactions.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: When the transaction record was created in the database. From SentTransactions.Occurred or ReceivedTransactions.Occurred.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: When the transaction record was created in the database. From SentTransactions.Occurred or ReceivedTransactions.Occurred.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Transaction date. For sends: SentTransactions.Occurred. For receives: ReceivedTransactions.BlockchainTransactionDate.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Transaction date. For sends: SentTransactions.Occurred. For receives: ReceivedTransactions.BlockchainTransactionDate. DWH note: identical to TranDate source (TransDate from the view) but stored as datetime instead of date.
t1_fidelity_table.loss: Added DWH type note after verbatim upstream text; no semantic loss

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: When the transaction record was created in the database. From SentTransactions.Occurred or ReceivedTransactions.Occurred.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: When the transaction record was created in the database. From SentTransactions.Occurred or ReceivedTransactions.Occurred. DWH note: CAST of Occurred to DATE, dropping the time component. Intentional misspelling 'Occured'.
t1_fidelity_table.loss: Added DWH note after verbatim upstream text; no semantic loss

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Timestamp of the most recent status change. Resolved via correlated subquery like TransStatusId. Enables "time since last update" monitoring and SLA tracking. New in this version (not in TransactionViewOld).
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Timestamp of the most recent status change. Resolved via correlated subquery like TransStatusId. Enables "time since last update" monitoring and SLA tracking. New in this version (not in TransactionViewOld).

issues.problem: Footer claims '22 T1, 23 T2' but actual element count is 24 Tier 1 and 21 Tier 2. Off by 2 in each direction.
No formal Phase Gate Checklist section. Footer says 'Phases: 12/14' without specifying which phases were completed or skipped. Cannot verify P2/P3 status.
Tier 1 description adds 'Passthrough from Dim_Customer via GCID lookup.' beyond verbatim upstream text from Dim_Customer wiki. No semantic loss but technically non-verbatim.
Both columns append 'DWH note:' clauses after verbatim upstream text. Informative additions but deviate from pure Tier 1 verbatim standard.

Enum list omits type 4 (Funding), which is referenced by IsFunding flag (TransactionTypeID=4 for sent). This matches the upstream verbatim text which also omits it (type 4 falls into the 'other_transactions' catch-all CTE), but analysts may be confused by the inconsistency.

verdict.regeneration_feedback: Minor fixes only: (1) Correct footer tier counts from '22 T1, 23 T2' to '24 T1, 21 T2'. (2) Add a formal Phase Gate Checklist section or expand footer to list which phases were completed/skipped. (3) Optional: note TransactionTypeID=4 (Funding) in the enum values for consistency with IsFunding flag documentation.

skipped_phases: Phase Gate Checklist not present as formal section; footer says 12/14 without detail
